body.title: Wire NodeExecutor into BG habit dispatch
body.result: Engram habit_type dispatch added to main.py turn loop (after if_fork, before fallthrough gate). Finds fired_trigger by substring match against metadata.triggers keys. Builds basket with requester/node_id/user_input/_cortex/_salience. Calls execute_node(), logs result, writes ENGRAM_BRANCH/ENGRAM_FORK to ring_memory. Sets habit=None to fall through to LLM. Added 'engram' to fallthrough-gate exempt types. 555 tests passing.
body.description: When a habit fires and its node has a payload, execute the matching trigger cell with current basket. Fallback to existing code_ref dispatch if no payload. Activation model: cognition cursor lands on node, basket carried in, cell executes. Depends on T-engram-executor + T-engram-schema.
